diagrams.title: Class Structure in C++
diagrams.description: Shows the general structure of a class with all its components
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the anatomy of a class definition

diagrams.title: Object Creation and Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how objects occupy memory and relationship between class and objects
elements: Each object has its own copy of non-static data
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how objects are instantiated from classes

diagrams.title: Access Specifier Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows visibility levels of public, private, and protected members

diagrams.title: Constructor and Destructor Flow
diagrams.description: Timeline showing when constructors and destructors are called
elements: Sequence of calls for multiple objects
diagrams.purpose: Understanding object lifecycle and resource management
